final:
// // This module implements a 2-to-1 multiplexer that selects between inputs 'a' and 'b' based on the inverted value of the select signal 'sel_b1'. When 'sel_b1' is low (0), the output 'out_mux' reflects the value of input 'b', and when 'sel_b1' is high (1), it reflects the value of input 'a'.
module top_module(
    input a,
    input b,
    input sel_b1,
    output reg out_mux
);always @(*) begin
    if(sel_b1) begin
        out_mux = b;
    end else begin
        out_mux = a;
    end
end

endmodule

When 'sel_b1' is low (0), the output 'out_mux' reflects the value of input 'b', and when 'sel_b1' is high (1), it reflects the value of input 'a'.
